semantic.role: Mock Folder Summary for .spine/rules in English

English.purpose: This document provides a mock summary of the .spine/rules directory, serving as a placeholder for the actual rules and conventions governing the ArchSpine mirror system.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and AI agents who need a high-level overview of the rules directory structure and its intended purpose within the ArchSpine project.
key_takeaways: The .spine/rules directory is designated for storing project rules and conventions.
This document is a placeholder summary and does not contain actual rule content.
The mock summary is provided in English as a template for future localization.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供了 .spine/rules 目录的模拟摘要，作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统实际规则和约定的占位符。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要了解 ArchSpine 项目中规则目录结构及其预期用途的开发者与 AI 代理，提供高层概述。
key_takeaways: .spine/rules 目录用于存储项目规则和约定。
本文档为占位摘要，不包含实际规则内容。
该模拟摘要以英文提供，作为未来本地化的模板。
